# Credentials & Spray Tracker

> The single most valuable artifact mid-engagement. Found one cred? Try it everywhere.

## Master list

| # | User | Secret (pw / :NThash / key) | Type | Source (host + how) | Cracked? | Priv |
|---|------|-----------------------------|------|---------------------|----------|------|
| 1 |  |  | pw/NTLM/key |  | ☐ | user/localadmin/DA |
| 2 |  |  |  |  | ☐ |  |

---

## Spray matrix

> Row = credential, Column = host. Fill every cell — untried creds are missed wins.
> ✓ valid (user) · ★ local admin · ♛ domain admin · ✗ denied · ⊘ locked-out-risk · blank = not tried

| Cred ↓ \ Host → |  |  |  |  |  |
|-----------------|--|--|--|--|--|
|  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |

---

## By service (where each cred actually works)

| Cred | SMB | WinRM | RDP | SSH | MSSQL | LDAP |
|------|-----|-------|-----|-----|-------|------|
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

---

## Hashes to crack (queue)

| Hash | Type (hashcat -m) | Source | Status | Cracked value |
|------|-------------------|--------|--------|---------------|
|  |  |  | ☐ queued |  |

> NTLM = -m 1000 · NetNTLMv2 = -m 5600 · Kerberoast TGS = -m 13100 · AS-REP = -m 18200

---
